requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as International Baseline for Georgia BESS Project and GEOSTM Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为格鲁吉亚BESS项目与GEOSTM合格评定的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為喬治亞BESS項目與GEOSTM合格評定的國際基準

summary.en: Georgia does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or comparable mandatory certification regimes. GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) is the national standards body responsible for adopting Georgian standards (GOST) and — under Georgia's EU Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) alignment trajectory — progressively adopting IEC and EN international standards. Georgia is NOT an EAEU member; EAC/TR CU (Eurasian Conformity) certification is therefore not the applicable conformity route and EAC marks are not recognised in Georgia. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) is referenced for smaller cell formats. Under Georgia's IEC/EN alignment trajectory, project owners, EPCs, and grid operators are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as the technical prerequisite for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) is the expected system-level safety reference. Exporters should verify the current GEOSTM adopted-standards list and any mandatory technical regulation scope directly with GEOSTM before shipment.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或类似强制认证制度相当。GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准和计量局）是国家标准化机构，负责采纳格鲁吉亚标准（GOST）并在格鲁吉亚欧盟深度及全面自由贸易协定（DCFTA）对接轨迹下逐步采纳IEC和EN国际标准。格鲁吉亚并非欧亚经济联盟成员；因此EAC/TR CU（欧亚合格评定）认证并非适用的合规路径，EAC标志在格鲁吉亚不被认可。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）适用于较小电芯规格。在格鲁吉亚IEC/EN对接轨迹下，项目业主、EPC承包商和电网运营商预计将在项目规格中以IEC 62619合规作为BESS电芯和模组安全的技术前提。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）是预期的系统级安全参考。出口商在出货前应直接向GEOSTM核实现行采纳标准清单及任何强制技术法规范围。
summary.zht: 喬治亞目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或類似強制認證制度相當。GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準和計量局）是國家標準化機構，負責採納喬治亞標準（GOST）並在喬治亞歐盟深度及全面自由貿易協定（DCFTA）對接軌跡下逐步採納IEC和EN國際標準。喬治亞並非歐亞經濟聯盟成員；因此EAC/TR CU（歐亞合格評定）認證並非適用的合規路徑，EAC標誌在喬治亞不被認可。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）適用於較小電芯規格。在喬治亞IEC/EN對接軌跡下，項目業主、EPC承包商和電網運營商預計將在項目規格中以IEC 62619合規作為BESS電芯和模組安全的技術前提。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）是預期的系統級安全參考。出口商在出貨前應直接向GEOSTM核實現行採納標準清單及任何強制技術法規範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Georgia project specifications under DCFTA IEC/EN alignment)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (referenced for smaller cell formats in BESS modules)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety reference expected in project specifications)

GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (verify current adopted-standards list and any mandatory technical regulation scope directly; adopting IEC/EN under DCFTA; NOT EAEU-aligned)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Georgia project specifications or GEOSTM conformity assessment under the IEC/EN-aligned framework. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Do NOT pursue EAC/TR CU certification as an alternative — Georgia is not an EAEU member and EAC marks are not valid in Georgia.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准在IEC/EN对接框架下不被格鲁吉亚项目规格或GEOSTM合格评定接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。请勿将EAC/TR CU认证作为替代途径——格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员，EAC标志在格鲁吉亚无效。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準在IEC/EN對接框架下不被喬治亞項目規格或GEOSTM合格評定接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。請勿將EAC/TR CU認證作為替代途徑——喬治亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，EAC標誌在喬治亞無效。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Georgia's DCFTA alignment means project owners and grid operators reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Georgia project technical specifications or GEOSTM conformity assessment. EAC/TR CU certification is not a valid alternative — Georgia is not an EAEU member. Exporters should: (a) verify the current GEOSTM adopted-standards list and any mandatory technical regulation scope for BESS products directly with GEOSTM before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Georgia BESS projects; (c) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where project specifications require it; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme; (e) do NOT use EAC/TR CU certificates as conformity evidence in Georgia.
gap.zh: 关键差距：格鲁吉亚的DCFTA对接意味着项目业主和电网运营商将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被格鲁吉亚项目技术规格或GEOSTM合格评定接受为替代依据。EAC/TR CU认证不是有效的替代方案——格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员。出口商应：（a）在出货前直接向GEOSTM核实BESS产品的现行采纳标准清单及任何强制技术法规范围；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至格鲁吉亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在项目规格要求时取得IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（e）不得在格鲁吉亚使用EAC/TR CU证书作为合规证据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：喬治亞的DCFTA對接意味著項目業主和電網運營商將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被喬治亞項目技術規格或GEOSTM合格評定接受為替代依據。EAC/TR CU認證不是有效的替代方案——喬治亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員。出口商應：（a）在出貨前直接向GEOSTM核實BESS產品的現行採納標準清單及任何強制技術法規範圍；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至喬治亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在項目規格要求時取得IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（e）不得在喬治亞使用EAC/TR CU證書作為合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where project-owner specifications or GNERC/GSE connection requirements reference IEC 62619 compliance; GEOSTM mandatory regulatory obligation specifically for BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with GEOSTM; EAC/TR CU certification is NOT applicable (Georgia is not an EAEU member)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Georgia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Georgia project specifications under the DCFTA IEC/EN alignment trajectory. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Georgia project acceptance. EAC/TR CU certification is not a valid alternative — Georgia is not an EAEU member. Verify GEOSTM current adopted-standards scope and confirm IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with the project owner, GNERC, GSE, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，格鲁吉亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，在DCFTA IEC/EN对接轨迹下，IEC 62619是格鲁吉亚项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足格鲁吉亚项目验收要求。EAC/TR CU认证不是有效的替代方案——格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员。出货前请核实GEOSTM现行采纳标准范围，并向项目业主、GNERC、GSE及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，喬治亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，在DCFTA IEC/EN對接軌跡下，IEC 62619是喬治亞項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足喬治亞項目驗收要求。EAC/TR CU認證不是有效的替代方案——喬治亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員。出貨前請核實GEOSTM現行採納標準範圍，並向項目業主、GNERC、GSE及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據要求。
